attributes.Sql Query:

, CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL.INTEREST_LINE_ID
, CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME               
,'I' as ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL
WHERE 1=1
/*AND NOT (LINE_TYPE='LINE' AND DESCRIPTION = 'FREIGHT CHARGE') */
AND ORG_ID NOT IN (SEL ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL
WHERE CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND COALESCE(UPPER(CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL.interface_line_Context),'UNK') NOT LIKE '%HISTORY%'
